text: ctrl + space for menu (just like the watchdog menu)
reflection: Ctrl+Space now opens a functional loop actions overlay with direct keys, J/K navigation, Enter, and Escape. The overlay exposes create/duplicate/start/stop/restart/fullscreen/hide actions. Verified by three passing LoopActionsOverlay unit tests and a successful production Vite build.

status.comment: Implemented and internally verified; awaiting user demonstration and acceptance before marking done.
